nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: extend the image by removing the white parts, use the image for context

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
Same person as image 1 with identical face and identity. Preserve the exact same facial features, face shape, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, hairstyle and hair color from image 1. The identity must remain unchanged.

Apply the outfit from image 2 as a clothing reference. Transfer only the clothing design, material, and style from image 2 onto the person from image 1. The clothing must adapt naturally to the body of the person from image 1.

Face and identity are locked from image 1. Clothing is taken from image 2. Do not mix identities. Do not alter the face. Only replace the outfit. It's crucial to keep hair style and color.

Photorealistic, natural anatomy, clean proportions, realistic fabric, detailed texture, sharp focus.
